---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for UniSearch
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem statement

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you want.

## User value

How does this improve the user experience?

## Alternatives considered

What other solutions did you consider?

## Scope

- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Improvement to existing feature
- [ ] UI/UX improvement
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Localization improvement
- [ ] Other: <!-- specify -->

## Example / mockup (optional)

Add screenshots, mockups, references, or examples.

## Additional context

Anything else we should know?

## Checklist

- [ ] I searched existing issues and did not find a duplicate.
- [ ] This request describes one clear feature/improvement.
- [ ] I explained the expected user impact.
